jiraTitle: [BOPIS] Pre-selection fails for pickup locations outside first 50 results (pagination bug)

generatedCases.title: VCST-4707 Regression — Confirmed Pagination-Boundary Location Appears at Top of Modal on Reopen
xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations Returns Confirmed Location Regardless of keyword/filter/paging (VCST-4707)

phase5.browserFallbackReason: playwright-firefox not installed; used fallback chain

new.rule: Pickup locations confirmed in cart shipments must appear at items[0] of cartPickupLocations response regardless of paging, keyword, or filter. Confirmed location is fetched separately and prepended (ordered by PickupLocation.Name).
new.verify: Set cart shipment.pickupLocationId to a location alphabetically/positionally beyond the initial paged batch. Reopen modal or query cartPickupLocations with empty/exclusionary keyword and small first param. Assert items[0].id matches the confirmed pickup location ID.
new.violationSignal: Confirmed pickup location not at items[0]; modal reopen shows no checked radio; location absent from response when keyword/filter would otherwise exclude it.
new.applicationStatus: draft-only — --update-bl flag was OFF; per feedback_business_logic_promotion.md memory, requires explicit per-entry user approval before promotion to business-logic.md

recommendations: Apply BOPIS-087 diff to complete G9 gate (PASS instead of WARN)
Install Firefox on QA agent host: npx playwright install firefox
Promote BOPIS-091 and GQL-094 from Draft to Reviewed after peer review
Run /qa-regression bopis after BOPIS-087 update to exercise the fix in standard regression
Transition VCST-4707 to Verified/Done in JIRA — Phase 5 confirmed fix works
Consider filing a separate VCST UX ticket for missing user-facing pickup-modal pagination control (locations beyond first 50 reachable only via filter/keyword/pre-selection)
